codeReview.summary: Reviewed the worker transcript, handoff, commit diff, and current implementation for normalization/fingerprinting. The feature normalizes persisted finding fields, canonicalizes legacy anchor labels, derives deterministic anchor and semantic fingerprints, and applies a stable title-plus-path fallback canonical key when providers omit one.

summary: Pass. The feature requirements are satisfied in the current code: findings are normalized before persistence, fingerprints are deterministic and stable across line shifts, fallback canonical keys are generated when absent, and focused regression tests cover the expected behaviors. I did not find blocking or non-blocking issues specific to this feature.
